calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Plt'S Mtn To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK Re-Notice of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 IS DENIED; PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THE EXISTENCE OF A WRITING SIGNED BY THE PARTIES. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Tamara Willet-Harrison, CSR # 4609 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Capital One Bank's Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement is ordered off calendar. The motion was renoticed in Department 301. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Nici Rodich, CSR# 11604. (212)
